name: small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We convert legal case activity logs into client billing summaries instead of manual billing processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate billing summaries due to manual tracking of case activities.
features: manual entry of case activity logs

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate billing summaries due to manual tracking of case activities.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We convert legal case activity logs into client billing summaries instead of manual billing processes using spreadsheets.
must_have_features: manual entry of case activity logs
